data.title: CoStar Data Shows London Office Construction at Record High as NYC Sees Sharp Decline
data.description: In the latter half of 2025, data from CoStar revealed a substantial disparity in office construction between London and New York City. London had over 16 million sq. ft. of office space under construction, surpassing New York by more than 10 million sq. ft. The contrast between the two cities was notable, with New York having 5.7 million sq. ft. under construction. This discrepancy marked the widest gap in office construction volumes between the two cities.

data.title: Mitsubishi Motors Debuts First-Ever Special Incentive for Tennessee Residents
data.description: In an exclusive deal for Tennessee residents, a special incentive of $1,000 is being provided for the purchase of the 2025/2026 Outlander Sport SUV. This offer can be combined with other existing purchase incentives to potentially maximize savings. The starting price for the Outlander Sport is $24,995. The news was announced in Franklin, Tennessee on April 15, 2026.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For April 15, 2026
data.description: Several companies are scheduled to report their earnings before the market opens today. Polar Power (NASDAQ: POLA) is anticipated to share its fourth-quarter earnings. Vince Holding (NASDAQ: VNCE) is predicted to reveal earnings of $0.02 per share with reported revenue around $83.36 million. First Horizon (NYSE: FHN) is expected to announce earnings of $0.49 per share, generating revenue of $868.42 million. Bank of America (NYSE: BAC) is estimated to report earnings of $1.01 per share, with projected revenue of $29.82 billion. TRX Gold (AMEX: TRX) is slated to disclose earnings of $0.02 per share on revenue of $36.06 million. PNC Financial Services Gr (NYSE: PNC) is expected to report earnings of $4.03 per share on revenue totaling $6.22 billion. American Strategic (NYSE: NYC) and other companies are also part of the news update. For further details, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AVAX aims for $10.50 in 2 weeks with 72% long bias and $83M open interest. Whales accumulating, signaling bullish trend.
data.description: Large investors in the AVAX market are showing strong optimism for a potential surge, with 72% of positions leaning towards a long bias. Open interest in the market has also seen an increase of 5.5%, reaching a total of $83 million. Technical analysis signals a promising path for AVAX reaching $10.50, especially as the price remains above crucial moving averages.

data.description: TomaGold Corporation, listed on TSX Venture (LOT) and OTCPK (TOGOF), has disclosed their plan to conduct a non-brokered private placement, subject to TSXV approvals. data.title: Popmenu Partners with SpotOn to Help Restaurants Scale Growth
data.description: A recent partnership has resulted in Popmenu, a prominent restaurant technology provider, expanding its direct integrations with top industry providers. This collaboration, announced on April 15, 2026, is set to benefit restaurants seeking to enhance revenue generation and streamline daily activities. The integration promises to offer a comprehensive solution for these establishments by leveraging cutting-edge technology and industry expertise. This move signifies a significant step forward for Popmenu, establishing them as a leader in the field and highlighting their commitment to supporting the growth and efficiency of their clients' businesses.

data.title: ZEC set to break $420 in 10 days: Zcash at $358, with smart money 62% short, creating potential for squeeze.
data.description: Zcash currently stands at $358, presenting a classic breakout setup driven by oversold derivatives and high demand in the market. The sizable 62% short position taken by smart investors sets the stage for a potential explosive surge towards a target exceeding $420.

data.title: Virginia law mandates holding unclaimed crypto in-kind for minimum one year, limiting quick sale.
data.description: Virginia has enacted a new law that includes digital assets in unclaimed property regulations. This law mandates the transfer of digital assets in-kind and imposes restrictions on the state's ability to sell them promptly. The law aims to address the increasing significance of digital assets in unclaimed property, safeguarding individuals' rights and interests. This regulation will impact various stakeholders involved in managing unclaimed property, ensuring compliance with the state's requirements. The law signifies Virginia's proactive approach towards adapting to the evolving landscape of asset ownership, with significant implications for individuals and organizations dealing with unclaimed digital assets in the state.

data.title: GIGGLE likely to correct with target at $30 in two weeks after hitting high of $56.68. Momentum fading indicates pullback to $28-32 support zone.
data.description: The recent surge in GIGGLE saw a significant 53% increase, with the stock price reaching $56.68 before experiencing a retreat. This sudden spike is indicative of classic blow-off top behavior. The technical momentum has now begun to diminish at exceptionally high levels, indicating a potential pullback. Analysts predict a pullback to the support zone between $28 and $32.

data.title: BNB nears $617 as altcoin season heats up; could rally to $700 resistance. Charts hint end of accumulation phase.
data.description: The cryptocurrency BNB is currently trading around $617, remaining stable as Bitcoin faces challenges. This stability could indicate a possibility of BNB making a move towards the $700 resistance level. Technical analysis suggests that the current phase of accumulation may be coming to an end, signaling potential growth for BNB in the near future.

data.title: Central bank of Pakistan allows banks to open accounts for licensed crypto firms after years-long ban, signaling move towards regulated framework.
data.description: Pakistan's central bank has lifted restrictions and now permits banks to open accounts for licensed virtual asset service providers. This move signifies a significant shift towards a regulated framework after years of limitations.

data.title: Expect 'MiCA 2' to be considered as EU reviews existing rules, seeking input from industry players to shape the future of crypto regulation.
data.description: European Union officials are intending to review the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulation as companies are experimenting with its boundaries. Industry input will play a crucial role in shaping possible adjustments to the European Union's cryptocurrency framework.

data.title: Kyobo Life Insurance partners with Ripple for Korea's 1st blockchain bond settlement pilot, part of Seoul's tokenized securities plan by 2027.
data.description: Ripple and Kyobo Life Insurance have introduced South Korea's initial blockchain-powered government bond settlement pilot program. This development comes as Seoul gears up for the launch of a new tokenized securities framework scheduled for 2027.

data.title: DOGE's price might drop 30% to $0.06 due to consolidation break as it hovers around $0.09. Summer could test $0.06 support.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DOGE is currently trading at approximately $0.09, exhibiting a pattern of sideways movement that typically leads to notable decreases in value. This trend suggests that the meme coin may be approaching a critical juncture in the summer, with a possibility of testing support levels at $0.06.

data.title: OKX introduces X-Perps in Europe via Malta MiFID business, offering up to 10x leverage and multi-asset collateral.
data.description: The latest offering from the exchange is now accessible in the European Economic Area through its MiFID business headquartered in Malta. Users can enjoy leverage of up to 10x and collateralize multiple assets.
